targets.name: CsInH3
targets.p_synth_gpa: 3-5 proposed in repo guidance; not experimentally demonstrated
existing_evidence: Repo-local benchmark result: Tc = 214 K at 3 GPa after SSCHA
Synthetic alpha^2F only; real EPW is missing
Phase 07 ambient-retention analysis finds barrierless or near-zero-collapse logic at ambient pressure
required_evidence: Real DFPT + EPW baseline at the operating pressure
Direct synthesis evidence if elevated beyond benchmark use
Retained ambient superconductivity after pressure release, which is currently absent
targets.positive_claim_gate: Cannot pass the practical gate without P_op = 0 GPa or a retained >150 K quench route; current evidence does not support either branch

targets.name: RbPH3
existing_evidence: Primary-source theory predicts about 100 K at ambient pressure
Ambient stabilization is attributed to ionic quantum anharmonicity
Phase 08 leaves the route unresolved because the repo has no local mixed-evidence screen in the shared 0-5 GPa band
required_evidence: Repo-local 0-5 GPa thermodynamic and dynamic checkpoints
Full anharmonic stability at the claimed operating pressure
Evidence strong enough to separate synthesis pressure from operating pressure in practice
targets.positive_claim_gate: Must satisfy the shared Phase 09 gate and a clean VALD-02 ambient-branch pass without relying on literature-only claims

targets.name: KB3C3
targets.p_synth_gpa: high-pressure route proposed; exact threshold unresolved in repo
existing_evidence: Carried literature benchmark around 102.5 K at ambient pressure
Useful as a pressure-history and framework-stability analog
No repo-local hull or phonon checkpoint in the shared screen
required_evidence: Direct experiment or local high-fidelity validation before any practical promotion
targets.positive_claim_gate: May remain benchmark-only even if it looks strong; non-hydride analog success does not count as hydride proof

targets.name: KRbB6C6
existing_evidence: Carried ambient framework theory around 102 K
targets.positive_claim_gate: Reserve only until the shared gate is met

targets.name: Mg2CoH6
existing_evidence: No local hull or phonon checkpoint for the claimed superconducting route
required_evidence: Local hull, phonons, and superconductivity validation
targets.positive_claim_gate: Reserve only until direct evidence exists

automatic_exclusions: loaded-pressure Tc counted as ambient operation
non-hydride analog success counted as hydride proof

required_actions: Assign explicit verdicts to the baseline, primary, and benchmark routes
Run the exact VALD-02 threshold test
Keep benchmark and baseline roles distinct from a practical winner
